dependency_trace_format.completeness_rule: every emitted target field requires at least one trace entry with a source row, transform, and claim ceiling

endogenous_derivation_policy.budget_rule: use budget_limits_v1 before any downstream target use
endogenous_derivation_policy.clamp_rule: clamp out-of-bound updates and mark drift_clamped = true
endogenous_derivation_policy.composition_rule: weighted sum over normalized support, regulation, memory, and AP4 consequence context; N12 readiness contributes only validation context and never changes the target value

input_normalization.numeric_support_fields: normalize to [-1.0, 1.0] around the frozen support threshold
input_normalization.ordinal_fields: map by the frozen ordinal codebook

endogenous_derivation_policy.target_band_rule: numeric target_band = [target_center - target_tolerance, target_center + target_tolerance]; ordinal target_band uses the codebook category plus one adjacent category only when the drift policy allows it

rules: source rows are consumed only at closed claim ceilings
every source contribution is recorded in old_best_claim_inputs
every target field has a dependency-trace entry
N12 readiness cannot contribute native-support evidence
constructed N14 followout remains constructed followout
result remains AP5_candidate until controls and replay pass
